programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: John Mason (John Wayne) suffers a cruel homecoming when he witnesses his father's murder as he rides into town. Incensed, he chases after the killers, but he suffers a gunshot wound that cuts his pursuit short. Alice Gordon (Marion Burns) sees to his injury, and Mason is taken by her kindness and beauty. But things turn sour when her beau, Ben (Reed Howes), becomes jealous. After Mason discovers the men who killed his father, his plan for a duel is sabotaged by Ben, who has been manipulated.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: John Ford's landmark Western revolves around an assorted group of colorful passengers aboard the Overland stagecoach bound for Lordsburg, New Mexico, in the 1880s. An alcoholic philosophizer (Thomas Mitchell), a lady of ill repute (Claire Trevor) and a timid liquor salesman (Donald Meek) are among the motley crew of travelers who must contend with an escaped outlaw, the Ringo Kid (John Wayne), and the ever-present threat of an Apache attack as they make their way across the Wild West.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans (John Wayne), a cowboy on the run, is injured when his horse stumbles near a Quaker family's land. The family takes him in as he regains his health, and he falls for their young daughter, Penelope (Gail Russell). As Quirt falls deeper in love and becomes accustomed to the family's peaceful ways, his violent past starts to catch up to him. Eventually he is forced to decide whether it is worth letting go of his turbulent former life for his future with Penelope.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: The wife of a friend falls in love with Bart while he is recovering at their secluded mountain cabin.

Eventually he is forced to decide whether it is worth letting go of his turbulent former life for his future with Penelope.

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: Undercover federal marshal John Carruthers (John Wayne) is suspected by the local sheriff, Jake (George Hayes), of stealing the town's payroll, but his suspicions are sidelined when young Betty Mason (Eleanor Hunt) announces that her father, an important businessman, has been murdered. Without him, supplies will not reach town, and homesteaders will starve. When town leader Malgrove (Edward Peil) offers to buy the locals out, John and Jake get suspicious, and uncover a land-grabbing conspiracy.

programme.title: Django, Kill ... If You Live, Shoot!
programme.desc: The infamous outlaw Django vows revenge after he is betrayed and left for dead during a gold robbery.

programme.title: Pancho Villa
programme.desc: This mostly fictional account follows the trigger-happy Mexican revolutionary Pancho Villa (Telly Savalas) in his attempt to kill bitter nemesis Gen. Goyo and overthrow Mexico's government. The violent endeavor brings Villa north to New Mexico, where he battles a group of determined American soldiers led by the no-nonsense Col. Wilcox (Chuck Connors), and endures unanticipated mishaps and bad fortune, including a double-cross by his friend and partner, Scotty (Clint Walker).

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century in Mexico, an outlaw leads a massacre of a small town. Soldiers and townspeople alike are killed, and, when a priest and his followers take refuge in a church, they too are ruthlessly offed. A decade later, the town is run by Don Carlos, and the murderous outlaw has changed his name and is now a local priest. When Elvira trots into the town, she offers a large reward to whoever kills the savage outlaw.

programme.title: Seven From Texas
programme.desc: A young man and his wife are joined by the wife's ex-fiance to search for a doctor in a neighboring town.

programme.title: Man, Pride and Vengeance
programme.desc: Don Jose (Franco Nero), a Spanish soldier, meets the beautiful Carmen (Tina Aumont) and instantly becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Captain Apache
programme.desc: A full-blooded Apache working for the U.S. Army investigates a colleague's murder and uncovers a plot by a wealthy white farmer to instigate an Indian war; gunplay and bloodshed follow as the investigation deepens.

programme.title: Lawman
programme.desc: Young Owny O'Reilly finds stolen loot.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie pursues Butch Cassidy again, but instead of arresting the former outlaw, Hardie tries to recruit him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After Major Adams discovers a pair of outcast stowaways on the wagon train and allows them to remain, one of them is accused of murder.

programme.title: Bad Man's River
programme.desc: An outlaw and two con men attempt to relieve the Mexican government of $1 million. Once the scam is completed, they have to avoid the attentions of, amongst others, the Mexican army and Billy the Kid - all of whom are eager to claim the cash for themselves.

programme.title: The Restless Breed
programme.desc: Texas-border gunrunners kill a federal agent, whose son (Scott Brady) comes looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Brass Legend
programme.desc: Sheriff Wade Addams (Hugh O'Brian) is engaged to Linda Gibson (Nancy Gates) and searching for an elusive killer, Tris Hatten (Raymond Burr). Linda's little brother, Clay (Donald MacDonald), happens upon Tris' hideout one day, and immediately notifies Wade, who arrests the killer. Despite efforts to keep Clay's involvement a secret, the details come out and Clay's life is threatened. Wade must protect Clay while sidestepping attempts on his own life by Tris' henchmen.

programme.title: Hostiles
programme.desc: In 1892, legendary Army Capt. Joseph Blocker reluctantly agrees to escort a dying Cheyenne war chief and his family back to their tribal land. Embarking on a harrowing and perilous journey from Fort Berringer, N.M., to the grasslands of Montana, they soon encounter a young widow whose family was killed on the plains. The travelers must now band together to survive a punishing landscape that's crawling with hostile Comanches and vicious outlaws.

programme.title: Jericho
programme.desc: Jericho (Mark Valley) wakes up with no memory, but it's apparent that he's quite skilled with a gun. He is befriended by Joshua (Leon Coffee), who appears to be his polar opposite: He's a black man and true believer in the Lord, whereas Jericho is white and doubtful of everything, especially himself. Side by side, they attempt to piece together the amnesiac's past, which may or may not have something to do with a robbery, and either way is somehow connected to a town that's also called Jericho.

programme.title: Man, Pride and Vengeance
programme.desc: Don Jose (Franco Nero), a Spanish soldier, meets the beautiful Carmen (Tina Aumont) and instantly becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison. Years pass before Rio finally breaks free to enact his long-plotted revenge. Tracking Dad to California, Rio learns he's become a sheriff -- which is no deterrent -- but when Rio falls for Dad's stepdaughter, Louisa (Pina Pellicer), he has second thoughts.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A talk-show host (Clive Revill) and a cab driver (Garrett Morris) help Jessica solve the murder of a New Orleans jazz musician.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: My Johnny Lies Over the Ocean
programme.desc: On a pleasure cruise, Jessica's niece (Belinda Montgomery) receives flowers and messages from her late husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Murder is part of a legendary artist's (Cesar Romero) birthday celebration on a Mediterranean island paradise.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica cooperates with private detective Harry McGraw (Jerry Orbach), whose partner died while researching a murder trial.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica inherits part of a pro football team, but the owner's murder convinces her there is more roughness off the field than on.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica opposes an ambitious district attorney (Pat Harrington) who believes her poet friend (Paul Sand) killed a novelist.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Stranded at a roadside diner by a storm, bus passengers Jessica and Sheriff Tupper investigate the murder of a fellow traveler.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Hospitalized in Dallas after an airport accident, Jessica endures the inconvenience of a leg cast to probe an in-patient murder.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiancé, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law and order as she investigates a murder and crosses paths with by-the-books prosecuting attorney Chad Norton; Delores has a secret.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries
programme.desc: After several of the clues in her recent puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor is drawn into the investigation; while searching for answers, she clashes with the no-nonsense detective overseeing the case.

programme.title: Family Practice Mysteries
programme.desc: A former Army surgeon moves back to her hometown and joins a practice of family doctors. However, her quiet life gets upended when she tries to solve the mysterious death of a patient.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites with her college roommate at a desert resort and probes the murder of the woman's ex-husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: At a Wyoming rancher's grave, a man shocks mourners -- including the deceased's daughter -- by claiming to be the true heir.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica masquerades as a wealthy widow at a luxurious tropical hotel in an effort to trap the murderer of her good friend.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A cheap tycoon with many enemies is found dead on the construction site of his high-rise hotel.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's actress niece (Alice Krige) is the prime suspect in the murder of a daytime-drama writer (Jessica Walter).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is drawn into the investigation when an obnoxious man is murdered on the weekend she visits a college campus.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica heads to London in answer to a foreboding message from her cousin (Angela Lansbury in a dual role).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's friend (Ann Blyth) fears she is going insane and may have murdered her husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While staying at a lakeside inn, Jessica investigates the drowning of a championship swimmer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While staying at a lakeside inn, Jessica investigates the drowning of a championship swimmer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica must help her niece, a jockey whose first victory is followed by charges of murdering the horse's owner.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While teaching an English class at a women's prison, Jessica steps in when a murder leads to a hostage situation.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman is electrocuted in the bathtub, and the chaos that follows makes things difficult for Amos as he prepares to turn the reins over to a new sheriff.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: When her patient is questioned about the sudden deaths of her parents, Hailey's previous job comes in handy to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: After Hailey Dean agrees to help Pam dispose of her parent's estate, her friend disappears without a word, Pam's boyfriend suffers a serious accident, and Hailey's boyfriend contracts a serious illness.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: Hailey works to track down a murderer that uses a dating app to find his victims.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: When Hailey attends her niece's school recital, she learns that the beloved music teacher has vanished; Hailey soon discovers several startling secrets among the staff.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: Hailey's professional code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession, so she must find another way to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries
programme.desc: Emotionally ready to confront her fiancé's 15-year-old murder, Hailey finds herself caught up in the case of a missing college coed; the deeper Hailey digs into the young woman's disappearance the more she's convinced that the two events are related.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Omegaball
programme.sub-title: Los Angeles Men's Group Stage: Game 3
programme.desc: A new form of soccer that has three teams on the field at once.

programme.title: Omegaball
programme.sub-title: Los Angeles Men's Group Stage: Game 4
programme.desc: A new form of soccer that has three teams on the field at once.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Another Country
programme.desc: An interracial couple try to raise their child during the racially polarizing times of 1956 Mississippi.

programme.title: The Great Lillian Hall
programme.desc: Broadway actress Lillian Hall pours her heart and soul into preparing for her next big role but finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. She strives to make it to opening night while holding on to her fading memories and identity.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

programme.title: Ex Machina
programme.desc: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Swiss Army Man
programme.desc: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

programme.title: Insidious
programme.desc: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside of it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: MLB Tonight
programme.desc: Featuring live look-ins, updates, highlights, reporting, interviews and analysis by MLB Network's experts.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.sub-title: New York Yankees at Houston Astros
programme.desc: Astros host the Yankees in the second of three games. Houston tries to capitalize on its 7-6 home record at Daikin Park. New York, sporting a 5-4 road mark, look to bolster its division. Both clubs aim for offensive consistency in this weekend clash.

programme.title: The Sandlot
programme.desc: When Scottie Smalls (Thomas Guiry) moves to a new neighborhood, he manages to make friends with a group of kids who play baseball at the sandlot. Together they go on a series of funny and touching adventures. The boys run into trouble when Smalls borrows a ball from his stepdad that gets hit over a fence.

programme.title: MLB Network Double Play
programme.desc: From April 26, 2025.

programme.title: MLB Tonight
programme.desc: Serving as America's pregame show, MLB Tonight will feature creative and outside-the-box segments that have become its signature, plus interviews with star players, detailed demonstrations from Studio 42's replica baseball field, analysis of all 30 clubs, and live look-ins of games. Before evening games begin, the program will heavily utilize MLB Network's Ballpark Cam to take fans inside the ballpark for exclusive access to batting practice and pre-game warmups.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.sub-title: San Diego Padres vs. Arizona Diamondbacks
programme.desc: The Padres face the Diamondbacks in the MLB World Tour at Estadio Alfredo Harp Helú. San Diego won its last series against the Angels; Arizona faced Toronto and Chicago. Both teams now meet in Mexico City for a high-altitude series.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reimagines the Hawaiian plate lunch with a hand chopped venison burger topped with homemade gravy and a fried egg, jumbo grilled shrimp, a humble macaroni salad and a heaping scoop of white rice.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Chicken Fried Deer and Creole Halibut
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares a traditional Northern Italian-style wild boar ragu. Paired with a hearty bowl of pasta. Next, chef Zimmern blackens beautiful crimson filets of steelhead in a screaming hot cast iron pan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole pheasant to make yakitori-style skewers and a homemade flatbread, cucumber salad and a mango chutney.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern champions the often-overlooked mackerel with a main salad of pickled filets, charred tomatoes, grilled frisée, and sweet summer peaches. Then, he grills it whole seasoned with caramelized onions, rutabaga mash and charred grapes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Carne Adovada.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon's tackles stress free cooking with recipes including sticky pork ribs, meatballs four ways and an amazing chilli chicken with ginger and coriander that just gets better and better with time.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches you how to get started in the kitchen by cooking delicious pork chops with sweet and sour peppers, pan-fried scallops with crunchy apple salad and a tip that will help you keep your knives sharp.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches us to cook some of his ultimate brunch dishes, including his irresistible spicy pancakes, a simple and delicious frittata and a fool-proof cheat's soufflé with 3 cheeses.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches us how to cook for special occasions, including stuffed lamb with spinach and pine nuts, Vietnamese-style fresh prawn rolls and a sumptuous whole sea bass stuffed with fennel, lemon and capers.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon makes the ultimate slow cooked dishes including caramelized figs with ricotta, phenomenal slow-cooked beef short ribs and melting beef brisket.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Smash Burger and Creamy Chicken with Mushrooms
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek meal of speedy sweet pea chicken, a juicy Smash burger and a chicken and mushroom rice traybake. He batch-cooks his seven-veg sauce, followed by a spicy fish soup. And finishes off with a perfect pudding of tinned fruit granita.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon's tackles stress free cooking with recipes including sticky pork ribs, meatballs four ways and an amazing chilli chicken with ginger and coriander that just gets better and better with time.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches you how to get started in the kitchen by cooking delicious pork chops with sweet and sour peppers, pan-fried scallops with crunchy apple salad and a tip that will help you keep your knives sharp.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches us to cook some of his ultimate brunch dishes, including his irresistible spicy pancakes, a simple and delicious frittata and a fool-proof cheat's soufflé with 3 cheeses.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon teaches us how to cook for special occasions, including stuffed lamb with spinach and pine nuts, Vietnamese-style fresh prawn rolls and a sumptuous whole sea bass stuffed with fennel, lemon and capers.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cooking Course
programme.desc: Gordon makes the ultimate slow cooked dishes including caramelized figs with ricotta, phenomenal slow-cooked beef short ribs and melting beef brisket.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings us to the bayou as he creates a NOLA-inspired menu complete with Chargrilled Oysters, Black Pepper Shrimp Po'boys, finishes it off with Bananas Foster, and washes it all down with a Fruity Grilled Hurricane.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Mad Good Food Host Derrell Smith joins Chef Dale Talde at the grill as they cook up some stupendous sandwiches including a Salmon Pastrami Reuben, a Meatball Banh Mi, and even some Grilled Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Mad Good Food Host Derrell Smith joins Chef Dale Talde at the grill as they cook up some stupendous sandwiches including a Salmon Pastrami Reuben, a Meatball Banh Mi, and even some Grilled Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's Pizza Time! Chef Dale Talde grills up amazing pizzas for every palate including a Detroit Style Pie, a Cheddar Naan Pie with a Spiced Chick Peas & Potatoes, and gives your childhood favorite French Bread Pizza a much needed upgrade.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Deluxe Dogs with Crusted Corn & Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde puts a modern spin on a classic All-American cookout with his loaded hot dogs, spiced smashed potato salad, chorizo & corn nut crusted corn, and bangin' banana pudding pops. Sparklers out for this spread!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde amps up your chicken dishes by making smoky chicken wings, a whole roasted turmeric ginger chicken with tamarind sauce, and chicken patties grilled in banana leaves with chili lime noodles. A frosty lime rickey finishes it all off!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde gets his beach vibes going with a grilled shrimp & lobster cocktail, clams with lemon breadcrumbs, a killer grilled king crab with burnt citrus butter, and a chilled mango frozen daiquiri. Don't you dare miss this beach party!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Ribs are a lifestyle, and Chef Dale's living it up with smoky beef shorties in tangy red wine glaze, Miami-style pork ribs dripping in bacon-guava BBQ, spicy baked beans, and killer key lime caramel cones. Grab some napkins!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde creates a tasty menu that kids & parents alike will love! Apple pancakes with coconut brown butter syrup, grilled cheese & tomato soup, cheesy chicken parm, and a sticky s'mores dessert rounds out the full day of deliciousness.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde is throwin' down a pizza spread like never before with his Chicago-style tavern pie with sausage & onion, a grilled pizza pocket with pepperoni & cheese, chicken wings a la pizzaiola, and a zesty grilled caesar salad to finish it off.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde pulls out all the stops for this daddy-sized dinner. He grills up prime rib with herb & horseradish crust, lobster & chili sauce American, charred green beans with garlic tahini, and cheddar-stuffed parker house rolls.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies working with live sea urchin and scallops by creating a showstopping seafood risotto.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Quail Noodle Salad and Antelope Stew
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern creates Vietnamese cold noodle salad and grilled quail. Next, chef makes antelope stew.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Southern Shrimp Skewers and Asian Crispy Rice
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern grills beloved shrimp in two distinct ways. He starts with jumbo shrimp and country ham skewers glazed with sweet-hot pepper jelly. Then, he creates Asian-inspired shrimp, served over crispy battle rice and a complex sambal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Creamy Clam Chowder and Mussels in Spicy Tomato Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Pheasant and Mint Basil Lemonade
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew prepares a crave-able appetizer of bison tenderloin bites served with tamarind sauce and a classic Hunan peanut sauce. Then chef grills prosciutto-wrapped whole trout stuffed with lemon and herbs served with rice pilaf.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Tomahawk Chop with Italian-style Eggplant and Panzanella
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares a simple trick for getting the most out Bison tomahawk chops.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares the ultimate shore lunch of fried walleye filets, served with a tangy homemade tartar sauce, coleslaw, and crispy fried potatoes. Next, chef grills bone-in elk chops with a simple mustard glaze over hardwood charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Braised Pigeon with Homemade Herb Gnocchi
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern cooks braised squab with olives and vinegar, a perfect meal for a fall evening.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern butchers a whole rabbit, then braises the meat in a rich and flavorful red chile sauce. He tops it off with a simple blended tomatillo salsa and fresh cilantro. Next, chef Zimmern cooks a comforting farmhouse meal of pheasant.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Goat Curry with Rice Pilaf and Carmelized Onions
programme.desc: Chef Andrew butchers a whole goat, using the leg and backstrap for a braised curry.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares his favorite way to prepare wild turkey breast, pan-fried over an open fire. Served with cheese sauce and jalapeno-bacon wild rice. Then, cooks a simple meal of seared salmon and a side of crispy potatoes and onions.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates an elegant, seared pigeon toast crowned with a Sicilian caponata bursting with grilled eggplant, olives, and capers and a crispy pigeon katsu served with a refreshing shaved cabbage salad and punchy ginger-carrot vinaigrette.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie makes three dishes for a party of four, that when combined, are cheaper than one meal out for brunch; it's a taco party for five people for $20.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Stale bread, old bananas, canned food and dry foods all get a bad wrap, but this is not the end of them; Frankie discusses why these foods should not go to waste.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an alt-right provocateur is murdered after giving a speech at a university in New York City, Maggie and OA investigate the school's more extreme political groups and rely on OA's sister, a student, for help.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA must find a couple that is responsible for a spree of violent armed robberies that led to the death of an off-duty police officer.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an investigative journalist is murdered, the team uncovers information linking the suspect to past cases; the victim's death strikes a chord with Maggie, leaving her desperate for answers in regard to a traumatic event in her personal life.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A serial bomber appears to be targeting Wall Street's elite; Maggie and OA search for a suspect who seems set on revenge; Dana deals with Spencer Briggs, a cocky profiler brought in to consult on the case.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family is kidnapped in an attempt to gain notorious internet fame; Maggie and OA discover the kidnapper's plans go far beyond abduction.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and Dana struggle to find justice for victims murdered by a serial killer; the mayor limits the investigation to cut costs.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: OA and Maggie team up with members of the FBI's Fugitives Department to track down a person wanted for murder who is also on America's Top 10 Most Wanted list.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team must take down a dangerous drug ring after an American diplomat is killed while being used as a pawn; Jubal and OA try to help friends from their past fight off their inner demons.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: George Banks (Steve Martin) and his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), are the proud parents of Annie (Kimberly Williams), but when she returns from studying abroad and announces that she's engaged, their whole world turns upside down, especially that of overprotective George. From meeting the in-laws to wedding plans with an over-the-top consultant (Martin Short) and his flamboyant assistant (B.D. Wong), it seems as if the troubles never end in this update of the classic Spencer Tracy comedy.

programme.title: Father of the Bride Part II
programme.desc: Just when George Banks (Steve Martin) has gotten used to his daughter, Annie (Kimberly Williams), being married, she announces that she's pregnant, making him an impending grandfather. Shaken by nearing this new milestone in his life, George soon has to process even more surprising news -- his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), is pregnant too. Reeling from these revelations, George gets help from the eccentric Franck (Martin Short), who, conveniently, has moved from planning weddings to baby showers.

programme.title: NHL on TNT Face Off
programme.desc: Wayne Gretzky, Liam McHugh, Anson Carter, and Paul Bissonnette present pregame coverage.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.sub-title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 3 at Bell Centre. After Josh Anderson gave Montreal a 2-1 lead, Nikita Kucherov tied it at 12:33 of the third to force OT. J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 into OT to seal the Lightning's win in Game 2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Edmonton Oilers take on the Anaheim Ducks at Honda Center for Game 3 of the West first round. The Ducks won Game 2 to tie the series. Cutter Gauthier's second goal of the night broke a 4-4 tie late in the third period to seal the win.

programme.title: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: NHL forward Wyatt Johnston and Howie Mandel set up NHL defenseman Lian Bichsel at a restaurant where a romantic proposal meltdown turns him into the unwitting villain.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates an extremist gun group after an anti-gun lobbyist building is bombed; SAC Bashar dangles a possible promotion for OA.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team realize they have a cross-country serial killer on their hands; the case has ties to Isobel's father, Robert, and his hotel, leading to revelations about their fractured relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an immigration agent is fatally shot at a hockey game, the team attempts to find the shooter, who they believe may also be targeting Congressman Curtis Grange, who was at the same game.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered in a New York City park after returning from a vacation, the team searches for a suspect linked to the drug trade; Scola turns over a new leaf when it comes to his relationships.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an officer is shot dead at a pawn shop along with the store's owner, the team tries to figure out why a young, recent Ivy League dropout is tied to the crime.

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the team investigates a deadly robbery, it discovers one of the perpetrators is a classmate of Jubal's son.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of brutal assaults; OA hides information about his own mugging.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a wealthy accountant is gunned down for secretly testifying against a notorious drug lord, the team's investigation leads Tiffany to ask for help from a friend who was formerly with the NYPD and is related to the dangerous crime boss.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the team works to rescue a 5-year-old kidnapping victim, Scola suspects the boy's mother isn't being forthcoming about why her son was targeted; Nina struggles to open up to Scola about matters in their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie returns from medical leave and helps the team investigate two homicides: a law student and a young man with possible gang ties; an inadvertent revelation from Maggie causes OA to worry that she is rushing back into the job too quickly.

programme.title: Pacific Rim Uprising
programme.desc: Jake Pentecost is a once-promising Jaeger pilot whose legendary father gave his life to secure humanity's victory against the monstrous Kaiju. Jake has since abandoned his training only to become caught up in a criminal underworld. But when an even more unstoppable threat is unleashed to tear through cities and bring the world to its knees, Jake is given one last chance by his estranged sister, Mako Mori, to live up to his father's legacy.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Aquaman, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Aquaman must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: The Demand is itching for a fight, but Chris Jericho has rallied The Hurt Syndicate to join him; AEW Tag Team Champions FTR respond to the special challenge laid out by Adam Copeland and Christian Cage for Double or Nothing.

programme.title: Selena
programme.desc: In this biographical drama, Selena Quintanilla (Jennifer Lopez) is born into a musical Mexican-American family in Texas. Her father, Abraham (Edward James Olmos), realizes that his young daughter is talented and begins performing with her at small venues. She finds success and falls for her guitarist, Chris Perez (Jon Seda), who draws the ire of her father. Seeking mainstream stardom, Selena begins recording an English-language album which, tragically, she would never complete.

programme.title: Selena

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Preparing for a funeral is never pleasant, but for Aaron, it is shaping up to be the worst day of his life. Sibling rivalry, meddling family members, and a little stranger with a big secret threaten to blow the lid off the coffin when Aaron struggles to give his late father a proper memorial.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Prince Akeem (Eddie Murphy) is the prince of a wealthy African country and wants for nothing, except a wife who will love him in spite of his title. To escape an arranged marriage, Akeem flees to America accompanied by his persnickety sidekick, Semmi (Arsenio Hall), to find his queen. Disguised as a foreign student working in fast food, he romances Lisa (Shari Headley), but struggles with revealing his true identity to her and his marital intentions to his king father (James Earl Jones).

programme.title: First Sunday
programme.desc: Petty thieves Durell (Ice Cube) and LeeJohn (Tracy Morgan) face a big problem: The two must come up with $17,000 in one week, or Durell will no longer be able to see his son. The goofy scoundrels embark on a haphazard plan to rob the neighborhood church, but they find the mission trickier than expected. When they arrive, they discover that somebody equally disreputable has already had his hand in the coffers. Now, they must trace the money to a group of parishioners.
